faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Pelham Manor?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Pelham Manor typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and treatment method used. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Pelham Manor homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments take 4-8 hours for a typical Pelham Manor residence. Heat treatments can often be completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require 2-3 visits spaced several weeks apart to ensure all bed bugs and eggs are eliminated. We'll create a customized treatment plan based on your specific situation.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments are EPA-approved and safe when applied by our licensed technicians. For chemical treatments, we recommend keeping children and pets away for 4-6 hours after application. Heat treatments are completely non-toxic and rooms can be reoccupied immediately after cooling down.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day bed bug service in Pelham Manor?
faqs.answer: Yes, we understand the urgency of bed bug infestations and offer same-day emergency service throughout Pelham Manor and Westchester County. Call us before noon and we can typically schedule an inspection the same day, with treatment beginning within 24-48 hours of confirmation.
